newsCenter.title: AI News
newsCenter.subtitle: Learn about our latest updates, product updates and industry news
newsCenter.comingSoon: News details will be available soon, stay tuned

platformMajorUpdate.title: Platform Major Update: New AI Models Launched
platformMajorUpdate.excerpt: We are pleased to announce that the platform has integrated the latest GPT-4 and Claude 3 models, providing users with more powerful AI capabilities.

award2024.title: ZhiHui AI Wins 2024 Best AI Platform Award
award2024.excerpt: At the recently concluded AI Innovation Conference, ZhiHui AI platform won the Best AI Platform Award of the Year for its outstanding technical capabilities and user experience.

industryTrends.title: AI Industry Development Trends Analysis Report
industryTrends.excerpt: An in-depth analysis of AI industry development trends in 2024, including large models, multimodal AI, AI Agent and other hot technology directions.

devConference2025.title: Developer Conference 2025 Coming Soon
devConference2025.excerpt: We will host the annual Developer Conference in March, where we will release multiple major products and feature updates. Developers are welcome to register.

workflowAutomation.title: New Feature Release: AI Workflow Automation
workflowAutomation.excerpt: The new AI workflow feature is now live, allowing you to easily create complex AI automation processes through a visual interface.

partnerProgram.title: Partner Program Officially Launched
partnerProgram.excerpt: We officially launched the Partner Program, welcoming all types of Enterprises and service providers to join and jointly promote the popularization and application of AI technology.
